title: Fleet anti-pattern: blanket .claude/ gitignore causes silent command drift
signal: Correct pattern: only ignore .claude/.provider (CC runtime state) and .claude/settings.local.json (local overrides). Track everything else: commands/, agents/, hooks/, settings.json. Blanket .claude/ gitignore causes wai.md and hook configs to silently diverge or vanish on clone/reset. Found in Minder (blanket ignore) and Basher (settings.json ignored with wrong comment 'contains API keys'). Spoke template .gitignore corrected in framework S121.
rationale: Silent command drift. Shipit syncs commands but git clone restores nothing. Hook config unversioned means new machine breaks silently.
